title: Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB
abstract: The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (Board) is adopting a proposal to extend for three years, without revision, the Board Public Website Usability Surveys (FR 3076; OMB No. 7100-0366).
action: On November 14, 2023, the Board published a notice in the Federal Register (88 FR 78021) requesting public comment for 60 days on the extension, without revision, of the FR 3076. The comment period for this notice expired on January 16, 2024. The Board did not receive any comments.
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Federal Register > Notice > 2024-07093
title_normalized: Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB
bm25_text: 2024-07093 Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB On November 14, 2023, the Board published a notice in the Federal Register (88 FR 78021) requesting public comment for 60 days on the extension, without revision, of the FR 3076. The comment period for this notice expired on January 16, 2024. The Board did not receive any comments. The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (Board) is adopting a proposal to extend for three years, without revision, the Board Public Website Usability Surveys (FR 3076; OMB No. 7100-0366)
